channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Dark chocolate scent may ease leg workouts, even on an empty stomach
item.description: A new study suggests the aroma of dark chocolate could make strength training feel easier or more pleasant.

item.title: Honey shows promise for anti-aging effects on human skin cells
item.description: Research indicates multifloral honey may help protect skin cells from premature aging and damage.

item.title: RSV prevention linked to fewer bronchiolitis cases
item.description: Nirsevimab and maternal RSV vaccination are associated with reduced hospital stays and oxygen needs in infants.

item.title: New guideline issued for Allan-Herndon-Dudley syndrome treatment
item.description: This rare thyroid disorder affects about 1 in 70,000 male newborns, and a new guideline aims to improve care.
